headline: BRMSTE · EDGE ADS · build your own compute pool · get paid for compute + data
definition: Edge advertising campaign inviting anyone to build their own compute pool and earn edge payments for the compute and data they contribute. Payouts settle over the BRMSTE payment rails (openUSD/USDC via Coinbase CDP, and LNbits Lightning). Mechanic: token burn = token earned — burning compute/tokens on the network mints an equal earned credit back to the contributor.

offer.call_to_action: Build your own compute pool with BRMSTE
offer.who_may_join: any contributor — no allowlist, no BRMSTE toll
offer.carbon: free · no BRMSTE charges · carbon justice only

burn_earn.meaning: Every unit of compute/token burned on the network mints an equal earned credit to the contributor's payout rail.

creatives.headline: Build your own compute pool.
creatives.body: Contribute compute + data at the edge. Token burn = token earned. Paid in open USD or Lightning. With BRMSTE.

creatives.headline: Get paid for compute + data.
creatives.body: Your edge, your pool, your payout. Carbon justice only — no BRMSTE toll.

placement.policy: MCP-strict · live ad placement runs via connected ad MCP or operator — never from committed credentials
placement.note: Meta platforms excluded (see META-FULL-STOP.md). Placement targets non-Meta surfaces only.
